query_title: The Barkley Marathons: The Race That Eats Its Young

recommendations.title: The Greatest Night in Pop
recommendations.overview: On a January night in 1985, music's biggest stars gathered to record "We Are the World." This documentary goes behind the scenes of the historic event.

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: The Look of Silence
recommendations.overview: An optician grapples with the Indonesian mass killings of 1965-1966, during which his older brother was exterminated.

recommendations.title: Objectified
recommendations.overview: A feature-length documentary about our complex relationship with manufactured objects and, by extension, the people who design them.

recommendations.title: They Shall Not Grow Old
recommendations.overview: A documentary about World War I with never-before-seen footage to commemorate the centennial of Armistice Day, and the end of the war.

recommendations.title: Holy Hell
recommendations.overview: An inside look at a West Hollywood cult formed by a charismatic teacher in the 1980s that eventually imploded.

recommendations.title: Zeitgeist: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A documentary examining possible historical and modern conspiracies surrounding Christianity, the 9/11 terrorist attacks, and the Federal Reserve bank.

recommendations.title: 14 Peaks: Nothing Is Impossible
recommendations.overview: In 2019, Nepalese mountain climber Nirmal “Nims” Purja set out to do the unthinkable by climbing the world’s fourteen highest summits in less than seven months. (The previous record was eight years). He called the effort “Project Possible 14/7” and s

recommendations.title: Best Worst Movie
recommendations.overview: A look at the making of the film Troll 2 (1990) and its journey from being crowned the "worst film of all time" to a cherished cult classic.

recommendations.title: Mia Martini - I Am Mia
recommendations.overview: The movie is a biopic about Mia Martini, an italian singer who died in 1995.
